calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2003 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-04-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition Of Guardian Ad Litem For Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day
Appearances: John C. Riccio,Esq. for petititioner, Elerwease Bradford, guardian ad litem to minor Thomas Polk. After hearing the evidence, the Court grants the petition for minor's compromise as follows: from the total judgment of $9,000.00, the costs to be reimbursed are $303.78 and attorneys fees of $2,174.05; for a net sum of $6,522.17 to be depositted into a blocked account, until the minor reaches the age of eighteen. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
